# Root Cause

Recorded:

## Summary

## Reproduction

- Steps that reliably trigger the bug (or why a reliable repro is not possible).

## Evidence

- Logs, stack traces, failing test output, git bisect result.

## Fix Hypothesis

## Regression Test

- Name of the test that fails on the old code and passes on the fix.

## Constraints

- Fix the root cause, not the symptom.
- Change one variable at a time.
- Add or update a regression test before implementation when feasible.
- If three fix attempts fail, stop and question the architecture before continuing.
